title: WEATHERIZATION SERVICES - 211info
text: MAIN OFFICE WEATHERIZATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides weatherization services to lower monthly utility bills and improve home energy efficiency. Weatherization includes insulation installation and air sealing. Work is performed by local contractors in accordance with state and local building codes and is then inspected by certified staff. 211 SE Byers Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Income-eligible homeowners and renters (upon landlord's approval) Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-noon (541) 276-1926 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 276-1926 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-1926 FAX (541) 278-2512 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Morrow, Umatilla, and Wheeler Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Enter from the front lobby doors on SE Byers Avenue, south side of the building.
